problem id: bc4d68f5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  10100000 -> 00000010
  00110010 -> 10010000
  00101110 -> 01110000
  00000010 -> 00010000
  00011101 -> 11101000
  10011101 -> 11101010
  00100001 -> 00001000
  00001111 -> 01111000

query: 11100000
predicted answer: 00000011
